name: Orange Cookies/no Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Juice and grate the rind of the orange; remove seeds from the juice.
2. Cream together shortening and sugar replacement until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg, orange juice, and grated orange rind to the mixture, beating until combined.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a sifter.
5. Add the dry ingredients alternately with buttermilk to the creamed mixture, stirring until blended.
6. Drop teaspoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets, spacing them 2 to 3 inches apart.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
